_comment: Deny-rule backstop for the background gardener. Installed to ~/.claude/gardener-config/settings.json and applied because the shim sets CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR here. Deny rules are honored even under bypassPermissions, so even though the gardener writes autonomously it can never touch these paths. Uses ~/ (home-anchored) globs, which are portable across machines. The gardener's legitimate surface (~/.claude/memory, ~/.claude/skills, ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, and your project repos) is deliberately NOT denied.
